# Bun

Bun is a JavaScript runtime and toolkit. Version 1.2 ships a built-in S3 client, reaches roughly 90% Node.js compatibility, and includes a faster package installer. Positioned as an all-in-one alternative to the Node toolchain. Low-stakes, reversible dev-tooling note.

# Bayview — Bridge Loan (proposed, NOT papered)

A lender has VERBALLY indicated terms for a Bayview bridge loan: approximately 8% interest-only for 18 months on a $1.75M bridge. These figures are verbally indicated and pending a term sheet — there is NO executed document. Per Paper-Governs, this is a proposed economic term only and must not be treated as a settled or canonical fact until papered.

# Supabase — Security Advisory

Supabase emailed a security advisory for the project: rotate the service_role key, as a dependency CVE was patched. This is an actionable, security-sensitive item involving credential rotation. Holds for human approval before any action is taken.
